calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-10-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:

Attorney, Gemma Daggs SBN 267831 of the law offices of Square, Inc. In-house Counsel, Ph: 415.857.0583 appears as counsel for defendant/appellant, Square Inc.

No other appearance is made in this matter

On calendar for hearing:
Trial De Novo on Appeal from Small Claims Court

Court read and considered a correspndence from plaintiff/respondent, Noah Ford, dated 9/8/2021 regarding his inability to apear this date.

Court hears from appellant's counsel. Appelant's Exhibit 1 (document tabbed Exhibit 3 within defendant's exhibits packet, titled Account Profile, Noah Ford and that includes transfers to JP Morgan Chase Account ending in 5796) is ADMITTED IN EVIDENCE.

Court is satisfied that Square, Inc. meets burden of proof.

Court rules from bench. Judgement of 6/21/2021 is reversed. Judgment is ordered in favor of Defendant/ Appellant, Square, Inc. and against Plaintiff/Respondent Noah Ford in the amount of zero dollars and zero cents ($0). Judgment is signed and filed.

Judge: Gerardo Sandoval; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported (D608)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2021 Set For Trial On Sep-10-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 608

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-08-2021 Continued To Sep-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-22-2021 Judgment Entered
